name: techzone
description: > A full-stack, production-grade e-commerce web application built with the MERN stack, featuring real-time order tracking, Stripe payments, Cloudinary image hosting, and a premium dark-mode UI.

scripts.dev: start /min mongod --dbpath C:\data\db --port 27017 && concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
